title: elatostema mindanaense
intro: Elatostema mindanaense, also known as Mindanao crevice vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Urticaceae, native to the Philippines. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Elatostema mindanaense include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to reduce oxidative stress and improve wound healing. Elatostema mindanaense can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction, and may also be used topically in the form of a poultice or ointment.
